name: Crockpot Glazed Corned Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the corned beef in the crock-pot and cover with water.
2. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours.
3. Drain the cooked corned beef, then place it on a broiler pan or ovenproof platter.
4. In a bowl, combine the mustard, horseradish, wine vinegar, and molasses.
5. Brush the sauce evenly onto all sides of the meat.
6. Place the meat in a preheated 400 degree Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius) oven.
7. Brown the meat for 20 minutes or until it begins to brown, brushing with sauce several times during browning.
8. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
